heroSubtitle: Transform any syllabus, textbook outline, or document into a fully tracked weekly roadmap. Guided by self-correcting AI mentors and adaptive assessments to guarantee mastery.
featuresTitle: An entire ecosystem designed to help you succeed
featuresSubtitle: ZachCourse combines advanced multi-agent workflows, interactive visual graphs, and social study structures.
testimonialsSubtitle: Join thousands of students who have transformed their learning habits.
ctaTitle: Your personalized learning companion is waiting
ctaSubtitle: Create a course in seconds and start learning with your own AI mentor.
footerText: ZachCourse. All rights reserved. Self-correcting curation powered by Agentic Loops.

testimonials.name: Jordan Davies
testimonials.quote: ZachCourse took the overwhelming Coursera syllabus and turned it into a bite-sized, 6-week daily roadmap. I actually finished a course for the first time in my life!

testimonials.name: Aisha Miller
testimonials.quote: The adaptive quizzes made sure I actually understood database relations before letting me move forward. The AI mentor felt like having a friendly private tutor 24/7.

testimonials.name: Takahiro Lee
testimonials.quote: Being able to paste any textbook syllabus link and get a structured tracking workspace instantly is a superpower. Best companion app out there!

features.title: AI Roadmap Builder
features.description: Generates custom weekly objectives, milestones, and daily tracking lists from any curriculum or outline.

features.title: Smart Mentor Chat
features.description: Ask questions, get step-by-step code explanations, or request real-time hints tailored to your active lesson.

features.title: Adaptive Quizzes
features.description: Automatically tests your understanding at each milestone with clear answers and personalized feedback.

features.title: Progress Tracking
features.description: Log hours, tick off completed items, earn achievement badges, and watch your daily study streak soar.

features.title: URL + Text Input
features.description: Import your course outline by pasting a syllabus link, raw markdown syllabus text, or even a book index.

features.title: Multi-Course Support
features.description: Organize your entire learning journey. Switch between multiple courses without losing your progress.

features.title: Interactive Visual Graphs
features.description: Explore your curriculum as a node-link visual graph with custom-rendered side-paths and parallel modules powered by React Flow.

features.title: Hands-On Module Projects
features.description: Apply your knowledge to practical, beginner-friendly builds generated dynamically based on your level and weekly learning progress.

features.title: Cohorts & Classrooms
features.description: Create shared study groups, preview and clone course curricula, sync leaderboards, and monitor active classroom student rosters.

features.title: Self-Correcting QA Loops
features.description: Critic and Judge agents synchronously evaluate lessons and roadmap ordering for optimal accuracy and clarity before delivery.

features.title: Guarded Document Pipeline
features.description: Deeply secure file ingest scans for prompt injections and malicious patterns while completely blocking server-side SSRF risks.

features.title: MCP Tool Server
features.description: Standalone Model Context Protocol server exposing robust Search and Fetch capabilities to cursor, claude desktop, and external agents.

noCreditCard: No credit card needed • Free forever plan • 2 min setup
understandingErrorGradients: Understanding Error Gradients and Chain Rule
understandingErrorGradientsDesc: To compute updates for deeper layers, we apply the chain rule of calculus to find how loss changes in response to each connection weight...
aiMentorQuote: “Think of error propagation like distributing grades in a group project: we trace backwards to see exactly who contributed to each final result!”
howItWorksPart1: From lost to on-track in 3 steps
howItWorksPart2: We bridge the gap between bookmarking learning content and actually understanding it.
howItWorksStep1Desc: Provide a website URL, a syllabus text, a chapter list, or simply type the name of a subject you want to master from scratch.
howItWorksStep2Desc: Our AI engine instantly slices the content into structured, manageable weekly goals, lesson targets, and actionable checklists.
howItWorksStep3Desc: Talk to your built-in AI tutor to explain tricky modules, pass interactive concept quizzes, and rack up daily habit streaks.
readyToFinish: Ready to actually finish that course?
readyToFinishDesc: Stop collecting unread bookmarks. Build your custom week-by-week roadmap, sync your study goals, and master your subjects.
freePlanIncludes: Free plan includes 1 active course and 3 quizzes/week
builtForGoogle: Built for Google x Kaggle AI Agents Vibecoding 2026
